## Type of change

<!-- Check the relevant option(s) -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Testing Checklist

<!-- Please verify the following: -->

- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and resolved all errors.
- [ ] I have run `npm run format` to ensure code is formatted.
- [ ] I have built the application locally and verified it works.
- [ ] Tests pass locally (if applicable).

## Security Checklist

<!-- Please review for common security issues: -->

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or tokens.
- [ ] Proper validation for any new user input.
- [ ] No unintended data exposure in logs or UI.
